title: Create docs/getting-started.md canonical entry + rewrite README Hero/Quick Start
description: 合并 quickstart + initialization 内容到 docs/getting-started.md 作为规范入口, 重写 README Hero 段 (移除 'Placeholder workflow' 字样, 加入主标语 '人机协作的语义共识平面'), 重写 Quick Start 段, 将 FAB_SERVER_PATH 环境变量细节移入 docs/contributing.md, 给 docs/initialization.md 添加 deep-dive 定位并加交叉链接. README/quickstart/initialization 三入口割裂削弱 v1.0 可信度.

files.change: 新建文件; 覆盖完整 7-stage 用户旅程概览 (基于 v1.0-launch-story.md 第一幕裁剪); 含 Stage 1 install → Stage 7 MCP active
新建文件; 包含 FAB_SERVER_PATH 设置说明; 开发环境搭建; contribution workflow
移除所有 'Placeholder workflow' 文字; Hero 段加入主标语 '人机协作的语义共识平面' / 'The Consensus Plane for AI-Human Collaboration'; Quick Start 指向 docs/getting-started.md
顶部加交叉链接到 docs/getting-started.md; 说明本文为 deep-dive 技术参考, 快速上手请见 getting-started.md
保留或重定向到 docs/getting-started.md — 如内容完全重叠可删除并用 redirect 注释替代

implementation: Read ANL-fabric-product-2026-04-19/v1.0-launch-story.md lines 1-200 to extract Act 1 (first-run story) as getting-started source material
Read existing README.md to identify exact Placeholder sections and Quick Start content to replace
Read docs/initialization.md and docs/quickstart.md to understand current content and determine merge strategy
Create docs/getting-started.md: 7-stage structure (Install → Project init → fab init → Agent config → fab serve → MCP active → First ledger entry); embed key CLI output samples from launch story
Create docs/contributing.md: Prerequisites section; FAB_SERVER_PATH setup (moved from README/quickstart); pnpm dev workflow; test commands
Update README.md: replace Placeholder text with locked taglines; update Quick Start to 3-step summary linking to getting-started.md
Update docs/initialization.md: add header cross-link callout pointing to getting-started.md

reference.examples: Locked taglines: zh='人机协作的语义共识平面', en='The Consensus Plane for AI-Human Collaboration'

criteria: grep '人机协作的语义共识平面' README.md returns >= 1 match
docs/getting-started.md exists and has >= 7 stage headings
convergence.definition_of_done: README Hero 展现产品可信度, getting-started.md 作为规范入口覆盖 7 阶段用户旅程, FAB_SERVER_PATH 开发细节归入 contributing.md

rationale.chosen_approach: 新建 getting-started.md 作为规范入口, 重写 README (不删除, 保持向后兼容), initialization.md 降级为 deep-dive
decision_factors: locked decision: 主标语已锁定中英两版
README 是 npm 首屏, 必须清晰
FAB_SERVER_PATH 是开发者细节不应在主 README
rationale.tradeoffs: 需要阅读 1279 行 launch story 提取 Act 1 内容, 但 7-stage 结构已有 initialization.md 参考

commit.message_template: docs(onboarding): getting-started.md canonical + README Hero rewrite
